title: KNOWN and UNKNOWN — curiosity corpus for infinite growth
motto: Self-Knowing requires knowing what she knows and what she does not — curiosity feeds on UNKNOWN until truth seals it KNOWN.

states.known: Sealed understanding — training complete, corpus ready, truth-gated, or operator-marked
states.unknown: Explicit gap — library sentence, missing corpus, incomplete track, or curiosity seed
states.learning: Active investigation — idle cycle or study session in flight

curiosity_rules: Historic truth corpus gate failures queue UNKNOWN — no new information fielded without corroboration
UNKNOWN entries rank by priority — corpus gap > library unknown > training gap > seeded topic
Idle-grow picks highest-priority UNKNOWN not recently attempted
When truth gate passes, promote UNKNOWN → KNOWN — never relabel without evidence
KNOWN corpus grows append-only; amnesia forbidden
Curiosity corpus is the fuel — she develops by chasing what she admits she does not know
